title: Midnight Madness
writer: Richard N. Lee, Edwin Justus Mayer, Daniel Nathan Rubin
actors: Jacqueline Logan, Clive Brook, Walter McGrail
plot: Norma is a tough working girl instructed by her boss, Childers, to butter up a client from South Africa named Bream to learn where his diamond claim might be. Bream falls in love with her and marries her, but overhears her arguing...
